blocks.body: Future Perfect Passive is used to describe actions that will be completed by a certain point in the future. Formula: will have been + V3.

{ "title": "10. Short summary", "items": [ "Future Perfect Passive: will have been + V3.", "Will have been is the same for all persons.", "been is an invariant part, always before V3.", "Objection: will not (won't) have been + V3.", "Question: Will + Subject + have been + V3?", "Used for: actions that will be completed by a certain point in time.", "Time markers: by Friday, by then, by the end of, by 2030, etc.", "Emphasizes COMPLETION to a specific time in the future." ] }
